# Grow Your Business Today
## **What Our Business Growth Consulting Services Include**
## Strategic Business Plans
Empower your business with our comprehensive Business Consulting Services and Strategic Business Solutions. From expert Management Consulting to precise Fundraising Support, we craft fully-researched, well-designed Business Plans, Pitch Decks, and conduct industry-specific, thorough Market Research to drive your success in today’s dynamic market.
[![understanding the work flow](https://www.dnagrowth.com/)](https://www.dnagrowth.com/strategic-business-solutions/)
[![detailed discussion with team](https://www.dnagrowth.com/)](https://www.dnagrowth.com/finance-and-accounts-solutions/)
## Financial Planning & Analysis
Experience financial excellence first-hand with our comprehensive Financial Planning & Analytics services. As a part of our full-suite business consulting support, we help your business leverage advanced MIS models, financial analytics, and powerful data visualization. Gain more clarity + control over your financial data, transforming insights into strategic, informed business decisions.
## Accounting & Bookkeeping  

Experience precision and efficiency with our comprehensive Accounting & Bookkeeping Solutions. As a vital part of our business consulting services, we offer an extensive range of services, including regular clean-ups, daily bookkeeping, tax preparation, monthly reporting, accounts receivable (AR) and accounts payable (AP) management, payroll, invoicing, and expense management. Get quick access to full controller support under one roof.
[![strategy & planning](https://www.dnagrowth.com/)](https://www.dnagrowth.com/bookkeeping-accounting-solutions/)

## **12+ Years of Brilliance:  
Leading in FP&A and Strategic Business Solutions**
Our management team boasts a combined experience of over 150 years, during which it has delivered exceptional business consulting services to a diverse range of clients across various industries, including SaaS, E-Commerce, Real Estate, FinTech, Professional Services, Logistics, and more.
[View Services](https://www.dnagrowth.com/services/)
### Client Success Stories
  * ##### Research and analytics support for a $300 Mn Edutech startup (exited)
  * ##### Built the entire FP&A framework from scratch, for a series-B SaaS in the US 
  * ##### Our business plans & fundraising fueled an Illinois real estate group's 55% revenue growth (CAGR) 
  * ##### Handling the entire finance & accounts team for a $50 Mn Canadian logistics client – Powered savings of $1 Mn in 8 months


[All Case Studies](https://www.dnagrowth.com/case-studies/)

## Why Choose Us
### Value for Money
We run a tight ship so that we can help our clients maximize their ROI from our services.
### Scale on Demand
Have an urgent deadline to pitch to a VC? Need to launch a new service and need content RIGHT NOW? We are here for you!
### No Minimum Commitment
We offer Pay as you go model, no minimum billing or monthly subscription. We are your one-stop support center without the fixed costs.
